CREATE TABLE test_graph (id INTEGER, data TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_graph (id, data) VALUES (1, 'Sample data 1');
INSERT INTO test_graph (id, data) VALUES (2, 'Sample data 2');
INSERT INTO test_graph (id, data) VALUES (3, 'Sample data 3');
SELECT * FROM test_graph WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_graph WHERE data LIKE '%data%');
UPDATE test_graph SET data = CONCAT(data, ' - updated') WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_graph);
DELETE FROM test_graph WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM test_graph);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_graph WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_graph WHERE id = test_graph.id);
